search_by_paper_ids.description: Look up specific papers by their IDs (e.g. W12345)
search_by_paper_ids.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
WHERE p.id IN $paper_ids
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC

search_by_author.description: Find papers written by specific author(s)
search_by_author.cypher:
MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
OPTIONAL MATCH (all_authors:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT all_authors.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_by_keywords.description: Search papers by keywords in title or abstract
search_by_keywords.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
WHERE any(keyword IN $keywords WHERE
          toLower(p.title) CONTAINS toLower(keyword) OR
          toLower(p.abstract) CONTAINS toLower(keyword))
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_by_venue.description: Find papers published in a specific journal/conference/venue
search_by_venue.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
WHERE toLower(v.name) CONTAINS toLower($venue_name)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_by_institution.description: Find papers from a specific university/institution/organization
search_by_institution.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH]->(inst:Institution)
WHERE toLower(inst.name) CONTAINS toLower($institution_name)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue,
       inst.name as institution
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_by_year.description: Find papers published in a specific year or date range
search_by_year.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
WHERE p.publication_date STARTS WITH $year
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_citations.description: Find papers that cited by a specific paper
search_citations.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:CITES]->(cited:Paper)
WHERE p.id IN $paper_ids OR cited.id IN $paper_ids
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a2:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(cited)
RETURN DISTINCT cited.id as paper_id, p.title as title,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors,
        as cited_paper_id, cited.title as cited_title,
       collect(DISTINCT a2.name) as cited_authors
LIMIT $limit

search_author_by_keywords.description: Find papers by a specific author about a specific topic/keywords
search_author_by_keywords.cypher:
MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
  AND any(keyword IN $keywords WHERE
          toLower(p.title) CONTAINS toLower(keyword) OR
          toLower(p.abstract) CONTAINS toLower(keyword))
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
OPTIONAL MATCH (all_authors:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT all_authors.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_by_year_range.description: Find papers published within a date range (since/after/before year)
search_by_year_range.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
WHERE p.publication_date >= $year_from AND p.publication_date < $year_to
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.publication_date DESC
LIMIT $limit

top_cited_papers.description: Find most cited papers, optionally filtered by keywords
top_cited_papers.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

coauthor_network.description: Find co-authors who published together with a specific author
coauthor_network.cypher:
MATCH (a1:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)<-[:AUTHORED]-(a2:Author)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a1.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
  AND a1 <> a2
RETURN DISTINCT a1.name as author, a2.name as coauthor,
       count(p) as shared_papers,
       collect(DISTINCT p.title)[..5] as sample_titles
ORDER BY shared_papers DESC
LIMIT $limit

author_venue_stats.description: Find which venues/journals an author publishes in most
author_venue_stats.cypher:
MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
RETURN DISTINCT a.name as author, v.name as venue, count(p) as paper_count,
       collect(DISTINCT p.title)[..3] as sample_titles
ORDER BY paper_count DESC
LIMIT $limit
